untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measuring S&P price change relative to previous close within a specific 30-minute window at market open. The available indicators do not support intraday time-windowed measurements or multi-asset cross-monitoring (observing S&P while trading other instruments). The 'returns' indicator approximates daily return but cannot be constrained to first 30 minutes of session or differentiated by instrument.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_15 is a regime recognition signal that requires intraday time-segmented data (first 30 minutes) and cross-asset observation (S&P as leading indicator). Standard OHLCV backtesting frameworks typically lack native support for session-relative measurements and multi-instrument rule triggers without custom bar definitions. Recommend: (1) Create a custom 30-min aggregation rule, (2) Add S&P as external feed, or (3) Use returns > 0.01 as daily proxy with awareness of false alignment.
